programme.desc: Blamed for the murder of his girlfriend, a man (Daniel Radcliffe) awakes one morning to find he has grown a pair of horns. Armed, now, with supernatural powers, he sets out to find the killer.

programme.title: Let Me In
programme.desc: Bullied at school, neglected at home and incredibly lonely, 12-year-old Owen (Kodi Smit-McPhee) spends his days plotting revenge on his tormentors and spends his nights spying on other residents of the apartment complex. His sole friend is Abby (Chloë Grace Moretz), a strange girl who comes out only at nighttime. Both outcasts, the two form a strong bond. When Abby's caretaker disappears amid a series of gruesome murders, Owen begins to suspect that she is hiding a terrible secret.

programme.title: Run the Race
programme.desc: All-star athlete Zach Truett finds glory on the high school football field -- working to earn a college scholarship and a ticket out of town. When a devastating knee injury forces Zach to the sidelines, his brother laces up his cleats to compete in track and field. Despite the setback, there seems to be one silver lining for Zach -- he soon develops a budding relationship with a young nurse who works at the hospital.

programme.title: A.I. Artificial Intelligence
programme.desc: In a future world, humans share aspects of their lives with companion robots called Mechas. But when an advanced prototype robot child named David is programmed to show unconditional love, his human family isn't prepared for the consequences.

programme.title: Labyrinth
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old Sarah must solve a labyrinth to rescue her baby brother when he is taken by the Goblin King.

programme.title: The Dark Crystal
programme.desc: On another planet in the distant past, a Gelfling embarks on a quest to find the missing shard of a magical crystal, and to restore order to his world.

programme.title: A.I. Artificial Intelligence
programme.desc: In a future world, humans share aspects of their lives with companion robots called Mechas. But when an advanced prototype robot child named David is programmed to show unconditional love, his human family isn't prepared for the consequences.

programme.title: Frank Miller's Sin City
programme.desc: In this quartet of neo-noir tales, a mysterious salesman (Josh Hartnett) narrates a tragic story of co-dependency, while a musclebound vigilante (Mickey Rourke) tears his way through the criminal underworld in search of his lost love (Jaime King). In another part of the city, a grizzled cop (Bruce Willis) foils the ambitions of a child-killer (Nick Stahl), and an ex-prostitute (Brittany Murphy) evades her ex-pimp (Benicio Del Toro) with the help of her new boyfriend, Dwight (Clive Owen).

programme.title: Jack Reacher
programme.desc: One morning in an ordinary town, five people are shot dead in a seemingly random attack all evidence points to a single suspect: an ex-military sniper who is quickly brought into custody Reacher, an enigmatic ex-Army investigator, believes the authorities have the right man but agrees to help the sniper's defense attorney.. However, the more Reacher delves into the case, the less clear-cut it appears.

programme.title: Jack Reacher: Never Go Back
programme.desc: Investigator Jack Reacher (Tom Cruise) springs into action after the arrest of Susan Turner (Cobie Smulders), an Army major accused of treason. Suspecting foul play, Jack embarks on a mission to prove that the head of his old unit is innocent. After crossing paths with the law, Reacher must now go on the lam to uncover the truth behind a major government conspiracy that involves the death of U.S. soldiers.

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Dockworker Ray Ferrier (Tom Cruise) struggles to build a positive relationship with his two children, Rachel (Dakota Fanning) and Robbie (Justin Chatwin). When his ex-wife, Mary Ann (Miranda Otto), drops them off at Ferrier's house, it seems as though it will be just another tension-filled weekend. However, when electromagnetic pulses of lightning strike the area, the strange event turns out to be the beginning of an alien invasion, and Ferrier must now protect his children as they seek refuge.

programme.title: Into Thin Air: Death On Everest
programme.desc: The compelling true story of two teams as they make their dangerous and fatal ascent on Mt. Everest in 1996.

programme.title: Miracle On The Mountain: The Kincaid Family Story
programme.desc: A dysfunctional family must pull together to survive a plane crash in the wilderness.

programme.title: Rolling Thunder
programme.desc: An elite corps of anti-terrorist personnel take on the tasks that no other unit of the government can handle.

programme.title: First Daughter
programme.desc: A female Secret Service agent goes against protocol to save the U.S. president from an assassination attempt.

programme.title: The Lone Wolf Takes A Chance
programme.desc: William bets Police Inspector Hall that he can stay out of trouble for 24 hours.

programme.title: Knock On Any Door
programme.desc: A crusading defense attorney fights to save an underprivileged young hoodlum from the electric chair.

programme.title: Run Wild, Run Free
programme.desc: A repressed young boy finds an emotional release through his love for a wild white colt.

programme.title: The Fuller Brush Man
programme.desc: A door-to-door salesman gets mixed up in murder.

programme.title: Last Vegas
programme.desc: Four lifelong best friends head to Las Vegas with a plan to stop acting their age and relive their glory days. Upon arriving, they quickly realize that the decades have transformed Sin City and tested their friendship in ways they never imagined.

programme.title: Gambit
programme.desc: Harry Deane (Colin Firth) is a man with a plan. Art Curator for media tycoon, Lord Lionel Shabandar (Alan Rickman), Harry devises an elaborate plot to con his abusive boss into purchasing a fake Monet painting.

programme.title: Shes All That
programme.desc: A high school jock makes a bet that he can turn an unattractive girl into the school's prom queen.

programme.title: How She Move
programme.desc: How She Move is an energetic and inspiring coming of age tale about a young woman step dances her heart out to achieve her dreams.

programme.title: Head Over Heels
programme.desc: Although she has an excellent job at the Metropolitan Museum of Art and a fabulous apartment with model roommates, New Yorker Amanda Pierce (Monica Potter) remains unlucky in love and intent on finding the right guy. When she develops a crush on neighbor Jim Winston (Freddie Prinze Jr.), she begins to spy on him and witnesses his apparent involvement in a murder. Since things don't add up, she tries to figure out what really happened -- and if she still has a shot at dating the guy.

programme.title: Nurse Betty
programme.desc: What happens when a person decides that life is merely a state of mind? If you're Betty, a small-town waitress and soap opera fan from Fair Oaks, Kansas, you refuse to believe that you can't be with the love of your life just because he doesn't really exist. After all, life is no excuse for not living. Traumatized by a savage event, Betty enters into a fugue state that allows -- even encourages -- her to keep functioning... in a kind of alternate reality.

programme.title: EDtv
programme.desc: In a desperate attempt to boost ratings, a cable channel decides to document the life of someone on a daily basis and air the footage as a show. That lucky someone turns out to be Ed Pekurny (Matthew McConaughey), a laid-back video-store clerk. While the TV series makes Ed an overnight celebrity, it also begins to wreak havoc on his personal life, complicating his relationship with his new girlfriend, Shari (Jenna Elfman), and causing tension with his brother, Ray (Woody Harrelson).

programme.title: Minnie and Moskowitz
programme.desc: Depressed and jaded after being dumped by her married boyfriend, aging beauty Minnie Moore (Gena Rowlands) wonders if she'll ever find love. After shaggy-haired parking lot attendant Seymour Moskowitz (Seymour Cassel) comes to her defense from an angry and rebuffed blind date, he falls hopelessly in love with her despite their myriad differences. Minnie reluctantly agrees to a date with Moskowitz, and, slowly but surely, an unlikely romance blossoms between the two.

programme.title: London Mitchell's Christmas
programme.desc: London becomes faced with a diagnosis of prostate cancer which forces him to rethink his total outlook on life during the Christmas holiday.

programme.title: Hit By Lightning
programme.desc: The loneliest man in North America finally meets the perfect woman but there's only one catch - she's married and wants him to kill her husband.

programme.title: I'll Be Homeless For Christmas
programme.desc: When a petty thief learns that his latest mark is a struggling single mother who works at a homeless shelter, he decides to use his savvy street smarts to make this Christmas one to remember for her and her young son.

programme.title: Santa Fake
programme.desc: Santa Fake is a musical comedy filled with Christmas spirit and holiday hijinks.

programme.title: Beyond the Night
programme.desc: When a soldier's son reveals damning info about a local gangster's missing daughter, a war of attrition ensues.

programme.title: The Virginian
programme.desc: After his parents are killed a boy is raised by a powerful cattle baron to uphold the "code of the west".

programme.title: With Love, Your Sweetly Salted
programme.desc: Critic Alison goes undercover at a restaurant she slated, but ends up falling for the chef.

programme.title: New Dogs, Old Tricks
programme.desc: Gamma Pi Omicron pledges retreat while Pete recovers. Sarah bonds with Jordan, and Allison gets her way.

programme.title: My Mother's Stalker
programme.desc: Old friends gets together for a high school reunion, only for a crime to set off a series of tragic events.

programme.title: Been There All Along
programme.desc: Charley, the founder of a dating app must team up with marketing expert Liam, to save her company.

programme.title: Twenty
programme.desc: Three best friends in their twenties go through a roller coaster of troubles as they face the reality of adulthood.

programme.title: Race To Freedom: Um Bok Dong
programme.desc: “Guns and swords aren't the only ways to change the world.” Based on true events, a cyclist brings hope and optimism to the Korean people during the Japanese colonial period.

programme.title: Closed School
programme.desc: After a crash, Yura and friends wake up at their closed school, terrified and unsure why they're there.

programme.title: Possessed
programme.desc: Hee-jin's sister vanishes, leading to a string of mysterious deaths in their neighborhood related to her.

programme.title: Killer Zaddy
programme.desc: Naomi Anderson is a college student, struggling financially looking for a new job. She meets a successful, handsome, older gentleman that gives her everything she's been dreaming of. Naomi soon realizes her dreams may come at a price.

programme.title: The Eye
programme.desc: A group of kids stumble across something unfamiliar, and have no idea of the adventure that awaits them. When the games begin the eye chooses its course.

programme.title: Unfaithful
programme.desc: Convinced his spouse is cheating on him, Barry hires private investigator, Charlie, to tail his wife, Kim.

programme.title: Sudden Passion
programme.desc: After reconciling, Ashley and her husband Timothy decide moving to a new town will help them get over infidelity in their marriage. Everything seems to be going great until Ashley gets a job at the local law office and begins a new affair with her boss, Bernard.

programme.title: Despise Not, My Youth
programme.desc: The most popular guy in school, Jason, is bullying his classmates, and living a life of mischief, until one day after getting high, he hears the voice of God commanding him to change his ways, or face going to hell.

programme.title: Buddy Rich, Tom Warrington, Bob Kaye & John Marshall
programme.sub-title: Buddy Rich Big Band - The North Sea Jazz
programme.desc: The North Sea Jazz Festival is the largest indoor music festival in the world, known globally as the event where the past, present and future of jazz are featured within three days. Next to a firm base of jazz as the festival's staple music genre, many others, such as blues, soul, funk, or hip hop, pass by. Buddy Rich, one of the most influential jazz drummers of all time, performed at the North Sea Jazz Festival of 1978 with his orchestra. Rich's drumming was known for its remarkable speed and dexterity, which he achieved without any formal education.

programme.title: Stochelo Rosenberg & Peter Beets
programme.desc: The treasured compositions of guitarist Django Reinhardt, the founding father of hot club jazz, are engraved in everyone's memory. Although Reinhardt missed two fingers of his left hand, his virtuoso technique was unrivalled. Dutch guitarist Stochelo Rosenberg and pianist Peter Beets now have the pleasure to bring Django's music back to life with their infectious improvisations.

programme.title: Wes Montgomery
programme.sub-title: Herbie Man & Sonny Sharrock - Memphis underground
programme.desc: This selection of unforgettable performances by some of the most iconic and influential jazz guitarists in history showcases these legends' unique essence. Revel in Wes Montgomery's virtuosity as he performs the captivating “Nica's Dream” in Holland in 1965, and delight in the expressive beauty of his rendition of “Here's That Rainy Day”, recorded in London in that same year. Experience the timeless appeal of Joe Pass's “You Stepped Out of a Dream” and “You Turned The Tables on Me”, recorded live in Hanover in 1975. The interplay between Jim Hall and Atilla Zoller borders on the impossible as they perform “Extensions” in Hanover in 1973. Enjoy Jim Hall's lyrical solo performance of “I'm Getting Sentimental Over You” from 1964. Witness Sonny Sharrock's avant-garde fusion of jazz and rock in an exhilarating performance of “Peanut", recorded live in France in 1970. Sharrock is joined by flutist Herbie Mann in a soulful performance of “Memphis Underground” from 1969. Immerse yourself in the magic of jazz guitar!

programme.title: Walter Trout, Johnny Griparic, Teddy Andreadis "Zig Zag" & Michael Leasure
programme.desc: Every year since 1970, the German city of Burghausen has been hosting one of the largest jazz festivals in the world. During Burghausen International Jazz Week, Burghausen becomes a 'Bavarian jazz mecca': guests from all over the world join the Burghausers to enjoy the most wonderful jazz performances as the colorful hustle and bustle of spectators and musicians shake up the city. One of the bands performing here in 2019 is the Walter Trout Band. Trout, who was born in New Jersey and is based in Los Angeles, is a world-famous contemporary blues rock guitarist and vocalist.

programme.title: Avishai Cohen
programme.desc: Double bassist Avishai Cohen's trio with Noam David (drums) and Omri Mor (pianist) joined forces with the international Symphony Orchestra ‘INSO-Lviv', conducted by Christian Schumann. On June 24, 2017 they brought Avishai Cohen's signature blend of influences from Eastern Europe, American jazz and the Middle East to the Alfa Jazz Festival in Lviv, Ukraine. Cohen, who also supplies vocalizations in the Judeo-Spanish dialect Ladino, came to prominence internationally in the 1990s when jazz great Chick Corea offered him a place in his trio and a recording deal. Thirty years later, Cohen has become a house-hold name himself, leaving his Ukrainian audience enthralled and connected through the universal language of music.

programme.title: Keith Jarrett
programme.desc: Lugano Estival Jazz is an annual open-air music festival that takes place over five days at the picturesque city of Lugano, Switzerland. Since 1979, this musical Mecca has been a must-attend event for all jazz and world music fans worldwide. On July 3, 1986, American pianist and composer Keith Jarrett is joined by bassist Gary Peacock and drummer Jack DeJohnette at Estival Jazz Lugano. Known as the Standards Trio, they put on an enthralling performance that shows these master musicians at their best.

programme.title: Christian McBride
programme.sub-title: Josh Evans - Ballad Of Ernie Washington
programme.desc: On July 20, 2018, double bassist Christian McBride presented his band ‘New Jawn' at the Malta Jazz Festival. A five-time Grammy winner, McBride is one of the most requested, most recorded, and most respected figures in the music world today. Hailing from Philadelphia, this music luminary combines jazz, R&B, pop/rock, hip hop/neo-soul, and classical. Gracing the Malta Jazz stage with him are Nasheet Waits (drums), Marcus Strickland (tenor sax), and Josh Evans (trumpet).

programme.title: Michael Mossman
programme.sub-title: Munich Philharmonic Hall: Michel Camilo Quintet
programme.desc: Well-known for his exuberant style and intimate familiarity with a vast range of jazz and Latin idioms, Michel Camilo has always had a sixth sense for musical adventure. Camilo was one of the most stimulating jazz pianists to emerge in the mid- to late '80s. His powerful two-handed attack (full of impressive technical skills), his knowledge of both jazz and Afro-Cuban music, and his willingness to constantly take chances turn each of his solos into an adventure. This broadcast was taped during the 1991 Münchner Klaviersommer, when Camilo was playing with his amazing Quintet. He is accompanied by Ned Mann (bass), Cliff Almond (drums), Michel Mossman (trumpet and trombone) and Ralph Bowen (saxophone and flute). Camilo's rise to fame has been swift, and his influences range from jazz musicians like Art Tatum and Keith Jarrett to twentieth-century composers like Debussy and Ravel.

programme.title: Isabelle Faust
programme.sub-title: Bach - Partita No. 2 and Sonata No. 3
programme.desc: Celebrated German violinist Isabelle Faust performs two of J. S. Bach's incredible works for solo violin: Partita No. 2 in D minor (BWV 1004), and Sonata No. 3 in C major (BWV 1005). Both works are part of the composer's well-known Sonatas and Partitas for Solo Violin (BWV 1001-1006). Partita No. 2 is made up of four dance movements, concluded by its famous Chaconne, a monumental piece within the violin repertoire. In this Chaconne, Bach develops a series of continuous variations from a theme, exploring a complex range of harmonic possibilities. Sonata No. 3 includes an extensive fugue in which Bach employs many contrapuntal techniques. In this wonderful performance, Faust shows her mastery of Bach's technically challenging pieces. This performance was recorded at St. Thomas Church in Leipzig, Germany, in 2020.

programme.title: Sinfonia Rotterdam
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Ballet du Capitole de Toulouse
programme.desc: Dance featured prominently in the work of French artist Henri de Toulouse-Lautrec (1864-1901), painter of Parisian nightlife, entertainment, circuses, and balls. With his ballet ‘Toulouse-Lautrec', Kader Belarbi, choreographer and director of dance of the Théâtre du Capitole of Toulouse, uses the work of the French artist to craft a new dialogue between painting and dance, impressively reviving the artist and his works. The fine and melodious music of the ballet, written by film composer Bruno Coulais, is performed by accordionist Sergio Tomassi and pianist Raúl Rodríguez Bey. This production features star dancer Ramiro Gómez Samón, who is on stage for the whole duration of the two-hour ballet, as Toulouse-Lautrec. Among the performers of the Ballet du Capitole are Alexandra Surodeeva, Natalia de Froberville, Marlen Fuerte Castro, and Solène Monnereau. This performance was recorded at Théâtre du Capitole in Toulouse, France, in October 2021.

programme.title: Nikolay Lugansky
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: David Grimal & Les Dissonances
programme.desc: Les Dissonances and leading violinist David Grimal by Symphony No. 8 by Ludwig van Beethoven at the Opéra Dijon in France. Beethoven spent the summer of 1812 in Bohemia, in the spas of Teplitz and Carlsbad. During his stay in Teplitz, he wrote his famous love letter to his "Immortal Beloved ", which inspired Symphony No. 8. The symphony is distinguished by its simplicity and its overall duration, which returns to the classical proportions of Symphony No. 1. Only the finale brings a little extravagance, contrasting with the conventional form of the first three movements in a more modest way that presents an interesting solo treatment of the instruments.

programme.title: Nikolay Lugansky
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Thomas Dunford
programme.sub-title: Works for lute by J. S. Bach
programme.desc: French lutenist Thomas Dunford performs various works for lute by J. S. Bach in this intimate chamber music concert, recorded at Concertgebouw Brugge, Belgium, in 2017. On the program are Suite for lute in G minor, BWV 995 Suite for solo cello in G major (arr. for lute), BWV 1007 and Chaconne from Partita for solo violin in D minor (arr. lute), BWV 1004. Paris-born lutenist Thomas Dunford (*1988) discovered the lute at the age of nine. He studied at the Conservatory of Paris and the Schola Cantorum in Basel, and participated in masterclasses with lutenists such as Rolf Lislevand and Julian Bream. He has made various solo and ensemble appearances at Europe's most prestigious festivals.

programme.title: Quatuor Ebène
programme.desc: Renowned French string quartet Quatuor Ébène marked the 250th birth anniversary of Ludwig van Beethoven (1770-1827) with a remarkable project: recording all of the great composer's sixteen string quartets. For five years, violinists Pierre Colombet and Gabriel Le Magadure, violist Marie Chilemme, and cellist Raphaël Merlin immersed themselves in Beethoven's 650 pages of sheet music. Their efforts culminated in the performance of the composer's complete repertoire for string quartet, which covers three decades of Beethoven's musical creativity, during six impressive concerts at Philharmonie de Paris in the autumn of 2020. Quatuor Ébène explored every facet of Beethoven's string quartet repertoire: from the youthful Opus 18 string quartets to the Razumovsky, Harp, and Serioso quartets (Opus 59, 74, and 95) from his middle period, and finally, the depth of his late quartets (Opus 127 to 135). This program features Quatuor Ébène performing Beethoven's String Quartet No. 3 in D major, Op. 18 No. 3 String Quartet No. 11 in F minor, Op. 95, “Quartetto Serioso” and String Quartet No. 8 in E minor, Op. 59, No. 2, "Razumovsky". This concert performance was recorded at Philharmonie de Paris on November 23, 2020.

programme.title: Black Eyed Peas
programme.desc: BLACK EYED PEAS are American hip hop group, consisting of rappers will.i.am, apl.de.ap, Taboo, and singer Fergie. Originally an alternative hip hop group, they subsequently added R&B and EDM influences. Although the group was founded in Los Angeles in 1995, it was not until the release of their third album Elephunk in 2003 that they achieved high record sales. Since that time, the group has sold an estimated 76 million records (35 million albums and 41 million singles), making them one of the world's best-selling groups of all time. Using interviews, news archive and performance this episode reveals the unique aspect of this iconic band.

programme.title: Buscando a Frida

programme.title: Eva la Trailera

programme.title: Eva la Trailera

programme.title: Los héroes del norte: Un Oscuro Pasado
programme.desc: Don Pascacio, amenaza a los Héroes con publicar las fotos si no recibe una importante suma de dinero. Mientras tanto, Prisca toma la decisión de abandonar a Hassan para siempre.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes: Finalistas
programme.desc: Visitan el programa: Luis Fonsi, Benny Ibarra y Bianca Marroquín. Los capitanes de los equipos participan de una ronda de preguntas que los harán ganar puntos extra.

programme.title: México de mil sabores: Tlayudas
programme.desc: En su paso por Oaxaca, el chef Jesús visita San Martín Tilcajate, donde prepara un espesado de Chipil y las tradicionales tlayudas, uno de los platillos más emblemáticos.

programme.title: Vencer el pasado: Nuevas oportunidades
programme.desc: Ulises le pide a Carmen que se divorcie de Heriberto y haga nueva vida lejos de él. Debido a que no consigue trabajo, un amigo le recomienda a Erik que sea entrenador personal de mujeres mayores. Renata intenta conseguir un nuevo empleo.

programme.title: Tres veces Ana: Pérdida de la memoria
programme.desc: Evaristo le dice a Soledad que ya no podrá ayudarla porque está perdiendo la memoria. Iñaki le dice a Ana Leticia que, en cuanto sea una mujer libre, quiere casarse con ella a cambio de su hermana.

programme.title: Amar a muerte: Mala relación
programme.desc: Lucía se encuentra con Johny para contarle que descubrió que Jacobo es León. Ante un confundido y atónito Guille, Jacobo aparece para decirle que él es León Carvajal, su padre.

programme.title: Imperio de mentiras: Nuevos padres
programme.desc: Elisa descubre que Majo está embarazada y le ofrece su ayuda. Teresa le pide a Adriana que termine su relación con José Luis. Leonardo le exige a Darío que diga la verdad sobre Eugenio.

programme.title: Abismo de pasión: Prueba de ADN
programme.desc: Damián enfrenta a Paolo cuando ve que tiene otras intenciones con Elisa. Florencia se da cuenta de que Damián está celoso. Augusto le pide a Edmundo que le haga una prueba de ADN para comprobar si Elisa es su hija.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó: Gran ayuda
programme.desc: Alejandro le cuenta a Montserrat que ya dio el primer paso para demostrar su inocencia. María le pide ayuda a José Luis para que Pedro no la mate. María le dice a José Luis que tiene una copia de la carta de suicidio de Joaquín Arechiga.

programme.title: Teresa: Fundación en peligro
programme.desc: Arturo le pide a Mariano que deje la fundación porque no quiere trabajar con él. Teresa le pregunta a Arturo que pasó entre Paloma y él.

programme.title: Corazón indomable: Muy enferma
programme.desc: Simona sigue con fuertes dolores de cabeza y culpa a Octavio de su desdicha Octavio le dice a Simona que aunque sea su dueña no va cambiar Maricruz le asegura a Octavio que nunca le venderá el rancho a Simona.

programme.title: Cuando me enamoro: Entre la vida y la muerte
programme.desc: Fina golpea a Constanza y mueve todo para que parezca un robo. Gonzalo le confirma a Fina la decepción que siente por ella y Roberta. Regina le pide dinero prestado a Jerónimo y le explica su situación. Constanza se debate entre la vida y la muerte.

programme.title: Al diablo con los guapos: El comienzo de algo nuevo
programme.desc: Constancio felicita a Mili por haber terminado la preparatoria, pero no se atreve a confesar la verdad. Néstor y Luciana se reencuentran. Hugo le pide a Mili que se case con él y ella acepta. Valeria regresa de viaje y le rompe el corazón a Rocky.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre: Un amor pasado
programme.desc: Gabriela le dice a Sofía que su hija está muerta. Fernando idea un plan para volver loca a Gabriela. Gabriela le confiesa a Franco y a don Agustín que Juan José siempre la amo.

programme.title: Destilando amor: Ayuda inesperada
programme.desc: Pamela le exige a su padre ayudarla a probar que Aarón tiene negocios sucios. Daniela le confiesa a Isadora que Gaviota pagó los gastos del hospital de su bebé y ella enfurece al enterarse.

programme.title: Teresa: Al borde de la muerte
programme.desc: Margarita, la esposa de Sáenz, amenaza a Arturo con una pistola, Teresa se interpone y resulta herida. Juana le cuenta a Mariano que Teresa recibió los disparos para salvar a Arturo.

programme.title: Rubí: Desquiciado
programme.desc: Rubí le confiesa a Héctor que no perdió a su bebé por su culpa, eso lo llena de coraje y la agrede, sin embargo él investiga y descubre que ella ha estado mintiéndole por mucho tiempo.

programme.title: Amor real: Déjame ir
programme.desc: Matilde le dice a Manuel que su matrimonio es un fracaso y le ruega que la deje regresar con sus padres le jura que no buscará a Adolfo. Manuel le recuerda que le juró amarlo hasta la muerte.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Jorge Luis le asegura a Meche que no tiene nada que ver con Fabiola y le pide que no sienta celos. Magnolia descubre que Rosario es su hija. Malvina humilla a Meche frente a Fabiola y la obliga a comer sola en su cuarto.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Sergio tiene un terrible accidente y Bella teme por su vida Antonieta se pone muy mal, tiene un parto prematuro y su bebé no sobrevive.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Bella está decidida a encontrar a Sergio, aunque tenga que pedir la ayuda de Rodolfo San Genis, él acepta ayudarla a cambio de que se case con él.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: María idea un plan para que la policía no encarcele a Nandito. Soraya llama a la casa de María para decirle que Luis Fernando está con ella. María sufre al pensar que Luis Fernando está interesado en Soraya.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: María se declara culpable del asesinato de la madre de Soraya para salvar a Nandito.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Manuel se preocupa por su hijo al pensar que podría suicidarse por la mala vida que tiene. Fabiola le dice a Jorge Luis que quiere mudarse a la ciudad y le pide que la lleve a su casa.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Jorge Luis le asegura a Meche que no tiene nada que ver con Fabiola y le pide que no sienta celos. Magnolia descubre que Rosario es su hija. Malvina humilla a Meche frente a Fabiola y la obliga a comer sola en su cuarto.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Sergio tiene un terrible accidente y Bella teme por su vida Antonieta se pone muy mal, tiene un parto prematuro y su bebé no sobrevive.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: Rosaura idea un nuevo plan para que Ana Paula perdone a Rogelio. Ana Paula decide irse de la hacienda para comenzar una nueva vida lejos de Rogelio. Ana Paula sufre al saber que Miguel podría volver a la cárcel.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: Rogelio le promete a Ana Paula que la ayudará a que Miguel no vaya a prisión. Ernesto le deja en claro a Gustavo que Ana Paula sigue enamorada de Rogelio. Gustavo sospecha que Bruno es uno de los involucrados de su secuestro.

programme.title: Juro que te amo
programme.desc: Pablo es violentamente golpeado y llega de emergencia al hospital y su vida corre peligro. Julio le pide a Justino que le dé trabajo. Rogelio le ofrece a Justino hacer negocios.

programme.title: Juro que te amo
programme.desc: La familia de Pablo y sus amigos esperan en el hospital a que recobre el conocimiento. Lía se pone celosa al escuchar llegar a Janis al hospital. Max logra hablar con Violeta y le pide que se vean para aclarar las cosas.

programme.title: Juro que te amo
programme.desc: Max sigue mintiendo a Violeta y le dice que la sigue amando, pero ella no sabe como corresponderle. El padre Basilio le cuenta a Claudio que Violeta se fue a la ciudad. Violeta le confiesa a Lía que no le dijo a Max que está saliendo con José María.

programme.title: Juro que te amo
programme.desc: Antonia le aconseja a Violeta no perder a un buen hombre y la oportunidad de amar a alguien más por su obsesión con Maximiliano. Mariano le reclama a Antonio por no decirle que planeaba irse de su casa y trata de convencerla de quedarse.

programme.title: Alborada
programme.desc: Catalina se pone nerviosa al saber que Cristóbal se enfrentará a un duelo con Diego Luis emprende la búsqueda de su hijo junto con Felipe.

programme.title: Alborada
programme.desc: Luis besa apasionadamente a Hipólita haciéndola sentir protegida y amada Victoria le cuenta a Marina sobre su pasado y lo que pudo llegar a vivir con su madre.

programme.title: La usurpadora: Abandono
programme.desc: Paulina le confiesa a Carlos Daniel que lo ama y él le propone casamiento. Leandro le cuenta a Abigail que Viviana tiene un romance con Willy. Douglas interna a Paola en un hospital. La policía va a casa de los Bracho para detener a Paulina.

programme.title: La Gata: Felices de nuevo
programme.desc: Fernando se sorprende al ver a Fela y la abraza. Por otro lado, Pablo y Esmeralda pactan no dejarse vencer por el rencor de los demás.

programme.title: La que no podía amar: Gran estafa
programme.desc: Cynthia recibe la mala noticia de que será trasladada al penal. Cynthia seduce a un policía para lograr convencerlo de que la ayude a escapar. Ana Paula decide divorciarse de Rogelio.

programme.title: Sortilegio: Una nueva identidad
programme.desc: Bruno se cambia el nombre para que María José no lo reconozca. Maura comienza a enamorar a Alex ahora que María José no está.

programme.title: La desalmada: Fuera de la hacienda
programme.desc: El padre de Brenda logra despertar. Leticia se niega a permitir que Isabela viva en la hacienda. Fernanda acepta la propuesta de Octavio de trabajar en la hacienda. Un mensaje contra Octavio aparece pintado en la pared, creen que fue César Franco.

programme.title: Abismo de pasión: Visita en la cárcel
programme.desc: Gael se preocupa al saber que su madre está desaparecida. Sabrina visita a Paolo en la cárcel y él le confiesa que Florencia no está embarazada.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña: Romance peligroso
programme.desc: Valentina lee la nota de Ivana donde explica la razón por la cual tomó las pastillas. Ivana le dice a Valentina que el hombre de quien está enamorada es Óscar, el socio de Alonso. Óscar lleva a Ivana al departamento de Alonso..

programme.title: Imperio de mentiras: Chantaje
programme.desc: Cristina amenaza a Elisa para que termine su relación con Leonardo a cambio de la libertad de Majo. Victoria se enoja al saber que Fabricio le está dando poder a Fernanda. Leonardo descubre quién es el padre de Darío.

programme.title: Vecinos: Vecinos centenarios
programme.desc: La prima de Silvia tiene su despedida de soltera y Silvia se entera que su prometido es un ex novio Germán ayuda a conseguir las cosas para ambientar, aunque no son precisamente del agrado de Silvia.

programme.title: Los héroes del norte: Tocando fondo
programme.desc: Zacarías termina su relación con doña Olegaria y comienza a trabajar con el Trácalas. Natasha trata de convencer a Apolinar para dar a conocer la verdad a través de un documental.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Vítor y Albertano parecen haber encontrado el amor por primera vez al conseguir novias, pero esos romances podrían terminar con su amistad para siempre.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Vítor y Albertano se convierten en guías durante un campamento y los niños viven una experiencia no muy divertida.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: La dueña del edificio comunica a los López que subirá la renta, pero Plácido por andar apostando, no tiene dinero para pagar. Los López consiguen dinero como pueden.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Plácido implementa un plan de austeridad en su casa para ahorrar, pero todo lo juega en sorteos. De pronto se entera que se ganó un automóvil, pero no tiene teléfono para hacer la llamada y reclamarlo.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Licha interroga a Adolfo y por fin se entera de dónde viene el novio de La Nena. Mientras tanto Martina hace una obra de caridad, convirtiendo a Tecla en una chica agradable.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Esteban Arce contacta a Plácido para que concurse por una enorme casa libre de impuestos. Los López tendrán que contestar a cinco preguntas, sin embargo, como en la última se tardan, pierden el premio. Aun así, reciben una sorpresa.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: Es la feria de San Juan y como cada año, Doña Lucha venderá huevos con confeti y harina pidiéndoles a sus hijos que le ayuden con esta tradición. Albertano y María entran a la casa de los sustos, Lucha al no ver a Albertano, lo busca desesperada.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: Don Carmelo quiere abrir una fonda en donde el platillo principal serían quelite, pero María no apaga la estufa y se queman, así que le piden ayuda a Doña Lucha para que cocine, al no tener muchos ingredientes, planea preparar sopa de lince.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Los Peluche regresan a su casa después de estar perdidos en una isla desierta que en realidad era Cancún y encuentran su departamento muy cambiado. El nuevo inquilino es ciego y cree que Ludovico es su hijo.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Federica y Ludovico se dan cuenta de que Martina y Flavio ya no quieren ser sus amigos, así que hacen todo por recuperarlos.

programme.title: 40 y 20: Se renta departamento
programme.desc: Paco se va de viaje y Fran encuentra la oportunidad perfecta para ganarse unos dólares alquilando el departamento de su papá a unos viejitos por el fin de semana unas horas más tarde el vuelo de Paco se cancela.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Sol le confiesa a Raquel que conquistará a Gastón para que olvide a Mia. Miguel y Mia se encuentran afuera del salón y le dicen a Roberta que no habrá protesta porque los descubrieron. El profesor Enrique regresa al Colegio y se encuentra con Julia.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Roberta platica con José y le dice que Gastón la odia, ella cree que fue una carga muy grande y por eso está enojado. Alma dona toda la ropa de Roberta a una casa hogar.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Gastón es buscado por la policía y cree que José fue quien los llamó. Mia le pone una trampa a Sol para que deje de usar su perfume. Teo y Miguel van con la policía a casa de Gastón. Miguel quiere impedir que Gastón se vaya.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Gastón se encuentra grave en el hospital y recibe la visita de Enrique, quien aprovecha para pedirle un favor. Miguel encuentra a Franco y Alma besándose, pero ellos le piden que no le diga nada a Roberta y a Mía. José tiene miedo que Gastón muera.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: León investiga a Diego y se da cuenta de que le ha estado mintiendo. Sin querer, Sol descubre que Franco y Alma son novios. El director hace una junta para decidir quién ocupará el puesto de Gastón. Jose está muy triste por la muerte de Gastón.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Diego decide salirse del grupo porque su padre no acepta que sea cantante. Los chicos tratan de convencerlo pero él está decidido. José platica con Lola y le dice que es doloroso ser huérfana.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: El profesor Enrique habla con Diego y le dice que podrá viajar a la gira en Los Ángeles. Diego le cuenta a Roberta que podrá ir con ellos a la gira. Mía se entera por un mensaje anónimo que su papá sale con Alma, ella cree que todo es mentira.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Pilar cuestiona a Tomás sobre Celeste Roberta admira a Diego por enfrentar a su papá León intenta que Franco y Alma no dejen ir a sus hijas al concierto Celeste va al Elite a visitar a Giovanni los papás de Lola le dicen la verdad de su origen.

programme.title: La fea más bella

programme.title: La fea más bella

programme.desc: Jazmín se niega a salir con Efrén, acepta la invitación de Simón y apaga el celular Lety se atraganta al escuchar a Lola decir de que la cuestionó Marcia Alicia cuelga el teléfono cuando Román la reconoce.

programme.desc: Maru, sufre de depresión, además abusa de los ansiolíticos y esto provoca descuido y abandono en Nicky, su hija adolescente Nicky consume inhalables y recae gravemente su prima trata de ayudarla. Maru reconoce que ella y su hija necesitan ayuda.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes

programme.title: Aquí y ahora

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: La desgracia de un hombre que con fuerza y voluntad cambió su vida tratando de ayudar a sus seres amados.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora

programme.title: Jamie's Easy Meals for Every Day

programme.desc: Jamie rustles up a super-fast, extra delicious crispy breaded chicken for the family he and Buddy share their secrets to a cheat's dessert then Jamie shows us how to transform a burger by using sweet potato in two new ways.

programme.title: Jamie's Easy Meals for Every Day
programme.desc: Jamie cooks up a big, bold sausage casserole, packed full of flavor -it's a new family favorite in the Oliver house, then he shows us the most beautifully brilliant way to dress an aubergine salad, served with the quickest homemade flat breads.

programme.title: Jamie's Comfort Food: Jerk Ham with Egg and Chips, Chocolate Nougat Cake and Chicken Kebab
programme.desc: Ham, egg and chips with caramelized pineapple chicken kebab with hummus and mango-amba sauce.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane discovers the history of her historic neighborhood in the heart of central Athens with the city's most renowned urban chronicler, and cooks up a delicious Spiced Roasted Chicken with Toasted Orzo Pilaf, Kale Caesar with Greek yogurt and a Crispy Phyllo Ice Cream Sundae with Honey, Nuts and Halva. (S4 E01)

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane explores the fast-growing vegan trends in Athens, honing in on the transformation of Greek classics like moussaka rendered vegan! She invites the country's best-known vegan chef into her kitchen. The results are delightful: Vegan Moussaka, Vegan Galaktoboureko, even a Vegan Yiouvarlakia, a Rice-Meatball Soup. Hint: mushrooms and avocados are involved. (S4 E02)

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane and chef Carolina Doriti explore the street food scene in Athens, tasting their way through vegan treats, savory hand-held pies, overflowing sandwiches and hand-made gelato. Inspired, Diane creates some homemade street food: a Gyro-Stuffed Baked Bread Loaf, a Warm Green Bean Salad with Chopped Onion and Hazelnuts, and a Healthy Smoothie Bowl with Greek Yogurt. (S4 E03)

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: No other city evokes the rich and complex history of Greek cuisine better than Thessaloniki, Greece's de facto culinary capital. Diane learns the secrets of bougatsa, an airy, creamy phyllo pastry, and boards a mussel boat just off the coast. In her kitchen she cooks up Feta-Stuffed Sweet Red Peppers and Mussel Pilaf. (S4 E04)

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane visits the home of 90-year-old Irini Pournara and her daughter Margarita, a journalist for the city's most respected daily paper. Eirini makes Athinaiki Mayioneza (poached fish and vegetables with homemade mayonnaise), and Diane cooks up A la Polita, a sophisticated artichoke dish, and a Meatloaf Wrapped in Grape Leaves. (S4 E05)

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Ioannina is a crossroads of the meat-and-cheese-centric cooking of the Pindus mountains as well as the culinary gifts of a lake in the northwestern corner of Greece. Diane focuses on this quaint old city's culinary and cultural lore: from a unique local version of baklava to hearty Clay-Baked Lamb to a Feta-Cheese Skillet Pie to a rare Clay-Tile-Baked Eel. (S4 E06)

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane visits a daughter of a Holocaust survivor for a tour of Thessaloniki's Jewish past and cook up Sephardic recipes, including Huevos Haminados (slow boiled spiced eggs) and Merenza Assada (grilled eggplant with meatballs in tomato sauce). Diane learns about Keftikas de Nogada (meatballs in walnut sauce) and at home, makes Chicken with Prunes. (S4 E07)

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: With Athens as a backdrop, Diane explores the foods that so many of us have in common regardless of where we are from. Can soba noodles be grecophied? Can a classic spanakopita be a filling for an American baked potato? Diane answers these questions and ventures beyond tradition into the global world, embracing new ingredients, and christens new recipes. (S4 E08)

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Densely forested mountains, stone-cobbled villages, sheep, and greenery are the stuff of Epirus's mountainous terrain. Diane visits a traditional shepherding family and makes a feta cheese pie baked the way it's been done for centuries: over embers. At home, Diane makes two of her own pies: a Pleated, Buttery Feta Cheese Pie and a Chicken-Phyllo Pie, both inspired by this region. (S4 E09)

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: On Mykonos, Diane discovers the quiet life and food of its local farmers, in contrast to the reputation as a dazzling party island. She tastes onion pie, delicious cured pork, and one of the oldest cheeses in the world, kopanisti, still made on the island. In the kitchen, she makes a garlicky local pasta recipe, and a traditional Greek island fish soup. (S3 E01)

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Gorgeous cafes, bustling nightlife, yachting and water sports, just 20 minutes south of the Greek capital, Athens. Diane visits a fish market where the catch is right off the boat, sails the coast, and returns to her kitchen to create three delicious, contemporary Greek recipes, inspired by the cosmopolitan bustle and fun-loving spirit of the Athenian coast. (S3 E02)

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane visits a famous local marble sculptor en route to visit an old friend and great cook, where she learns the secrets of pinched sweet cheese cakes, ancient sesame-honey confections and more. Back in her own kitchen, she creates a luscious Tinos-style artichoke bread pudding and red mullet in caper sauce, both Tinos traditional specialties. (S3 E03)

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane and friend and ultramarathoner, Dean Karnazes, meet up for a run. He helps Diane hone her technique, sharing healthy eating tips. Together they make a simple Greek salad with local ingredients and enjoy perfect Mediterranean living. Back in her kitchen, Diane cooks up a very healthy plant-forward Messinian meal, with lots of olive oil, beans and greens. (S3 E04)

programme.title: The Island with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: Bear Grylls abandons 14 ordinary British women on a remote, uninhabited pacific island, left with just the clothes they stand up in and a few basic tools. They're given no food and just a day's supply of drinking water. Like their counterparts on the male island, these women will be utterly alone for six weeks, left to film everything themselves. So when stripped of the luxuries and conveniences of 21stcentury living will these women have the skills and mental strength to survive and rival the male islanders?

programme.title: The Island with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: In the ultimate survival experiment, Bear Grylls has abandoned 14 British men on a remote desert island in the pacific with just the clothes they stand up in and a few basic tools. This time the survival challenge is harder than before, as they attempt to survive entirely on their own wits for six weeks in the height of the tropical storm season. In this film mild mannered paramedic, Barney Strange, comes to the rescue of the group by catching and feeding the men a tasty but unusual supper. Just five days in and the group has reached breaking point. The island has been battered by a series of torrential storms, and without a decent shelter the men have barely slept. They haven't had a decent meal since they arrived, and a bitter rivalry between the island's two builders, Paul and Andy has turned into all out war. Along with the youngest member, Joe, they are now both hell bent on leaving the island, much to the despair of the others.

programme.title: The Island with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: In the ultimate survival experiment, Bear Grylls has abandoned 14 British women on a remote desert island in the pacific with just the clothes they stand up in and a few basic tools. This time the survival challenge is harder than before, as they attempt to survive entirely on their own wits for six weeks in the height of the tropical storm season. The women are desperately dehydrated and separated, after an expedition party crossed the island to find a permanent camp - and got hopelessly lost while returning to the others.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Great Escape
programme.desc: In tonight's first programme, Gordon's odyssey begins in the north, home of our curry house classics. On board an express train he's thrown in at the deep end and experiences a back-to-basics baptism of fire, cooking for its many passengers in the train's cramped pantry car and getting travel sick while he's making curry. In stark contrast he then meets his match working for a cantankerous royal chef, preparing a biryani with a difference for a huge wedding feast before venturing into the jungle where he gets eaten alive by ants when he scales a 40-foot tree in search of the local tribe's favourite delicacy. Then it's on to Delhi to cook at the restaurant that invented tandoori chicken, where Gordon puts into practice everything he's learnt for a tough crowd of Delhi food critics.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Great Escape
programme.desc: In tonight's second programme Gordon's got a taste for adventure and heads off the tourist track into impenetrable north-east India, home of the country's best-kept culinary secrets. Leaving the 21st century behind, he immerses himself in the life of a local meat-loving tribe in Nagaland, once better known for head-hunting than their curries. Then he's off to Assam to enter a housewives' competition to find the best Assamese dish and finally he sets up shop among the street food stalls of Calcutta to try and tempt the local foodies into buying north-east curry – Ramsay style.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Great Escape
programme.desc: In tonight's final programme Gordon heads south to the coasts of Kerala for the ultimate seafood curry. In Tamil Nadu he hits a meat-free zone and faces his biggest culinary nightmare, living in an ashram where the only food on the menu is vegetarian. Any tranquillity soon evaporates when Gordon tries his highest-octane sport yet - bullock racing - before his final stop in the slums of Mumbai. There he cooks on Slumdog Millionaire streets before putting himself to the ultimate test, cooking alongside one of India's top chefs for a star-studded dinner at the Taj Hotel.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: The new season at Bondi introduces fresh faces with trainee Ryan, Maxi's cousin, who struggles with the megaphone. New recruit Chris from Western Australia faces a life-and-death situation. Mario tackles his first mass rescue on the jet ski. Young Jethro hits it off with a pair of drag queens.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Harry loses his temper with three swimmers he warned not to swim in a dangerous area, leading to trouble with boss Hoppo, who decides to test lifeguards' customer service skills with a secret "mystery shopper" on the beach. Comedian and actor Rob Shehadie plays an annoying wannabe lifeguard - Steve.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Cyclonic swell hits Bondi Beach with 12-foot waves, posing a significant challenge for Harries during a board rescue off Ben Buckler. In addition to the man in danger, H intervenes to lecture drunken youths burying beer bottles in the sand. New drone life vest technology is tested at Bondi Beach.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: A simple miscommunication during a serious rescue could cost two people their lives. Mouse and Chappo help a family to find their lost Grandma. Jess administers adrenaline to a young woman who is suffering an allergic reaction.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: On the day of the lifeguard challenge, Max and Jesse chase an inflatable boat ride, leading to further trouble when Jesse gets a buoy rope stuck in the jetski intake. The lifeguards deal with tourists using cheap boogie boards whose arm leashes break, causing them to quickly sink in deep water.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Backpackers trade snowflakes for sunscreen as they flock to Bondi for Christmas. The Hare Krishnas make an appearance, both on land and in the rips. Maxi plays a Christmas prank on his cousin Ryan, and Nicola receives news of a scuba diver drowning off Bondi's northern headland, Ben Buckler.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: For the first time ever, lifeguards treat a teenager suffering anaphylactic shock. An injury in the skatebowl. Bondi's newest trainee Harrison performs his first rescue. Santa's annual visit is more than a little unusual and the boys perform a surprising Christmas rescue.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: An 18 year old man breaks his leg and lifeguards administer analgesic pain killer. Maxi uses a tracking device to locate a thief. Corey struggles to stay calm when a bunch of Chinese school kids run wild. Local resident and amateur singer, Cora pens a tune about Bondi's hard working lifeguards.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Harries attempts to play matchmaker for Singlets. Harries, Max, and Singlets conduct a mass rescue, saving seven people caught in two separate rips. Harrison and Harries encounter a phone thief. A missing dad is reported on the beach.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Newbie Max paddles 600 metres to reach a lone swimmer treading water near shark nets. Lifeguards attend to skate park injuries, and newbie Tyson tests his skate skills with a pro. Lifeguards Jackson and John both attend to a woman struggling in the surf.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Rookie Lifeguard, Julie from Newcastle, visits Bondi to learn the ropes on Australia's busiest beach. She's never done a rescue before and hopes this could be her day. And a fight breaks out when a man confronts a photographer taking pictures of his topless girlfriend.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: On the predicted hottest day of summer, Bondi lifeguards brace for a huge crowd. Hoppo saves a drowning Chinese student. Evo rescues a semi-conscious woman. Newbies Matt and Noah face a test of their skills in front of their peers. To add to their stress levels, the lifeguard radio goes dead.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: One of the most dramatic Bondi rescue episodes ever. When lifeguards attend a man complaining of chest pains, he suddenly has a cardiac arrest in front of them. They perform CPR desperately trying to resuscitate him. Later a beach goer suffers an agonising dislocated knee.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Santa brings the South Pole to Bondi with the wettest Christmas day in 72 years, as Beardy rescues someone unexpected in atrocious conditions. A seizure on the sand challenges Kerrbox. The attitude of a new trainee raises concerns among some of the Bondi Lifeguards.

programme.title: The Missing RV and the Private Jet
programme.desc: First, Lou, Sonia, and Froy track down an RV that has been missing for 30 years, only to find that its owner is using it to cart around a group of impetuous young Canadian rock stars.

programme.title: First Class Clown
programme.desc: Matt and Froy are sent on a wild goose chase around L.A for a mini-van, and when they find their debtor selling contraband out of the trunk Matt is further convinced that Lyndah has been scheming against him.

programme.title: Go Big or Go Home
programme.desc: Fuming over Froy's departure, Matt loses his temper on a dominatrix and her client and packs his bags to return to LA.? Down two repo men, the pressure is on Ronnie and Carlos, who interrupt a couple in the middle of their less-than-holy matrimony.

programme.title: Exterminate or Retaliate
programme.desc: First, Lou calls in an exterminator and has Froy, Sonia, and Lyndah go to an address to ambush them for their truck. Next, Matt, Froy, and Lou bring the debtors to the ground when they head out to repo a back hoe tractor. And finally, Froy, Lou, and Lyndah bully their way through a bunch of ignorant punk kids to grab some four wheelers.

programme.title: Repo, the Final Frontier
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia trace an out-of-state skip account to a seedy motel, where they come face-to-face with a hopping-mad cowboy and his female companion. Then, Matt and Sonia go where no repo man has gone before to repossess a Ford from a delusional nerd who may as well actually be from space. And finally, Lou and Lyndah have trouble getting to their car because there's a chainsaw-wielding gardener in the way.

programme.title: Repo Outside the Box
programme.desc: First, Matt and Sonia attempt to repossess a car from a group of cleaver-wielding short-order cooks with a taste for violence. Then, it's trouble in paradise as Matt and Froy take on the task of reclaiming a beach-scene-on-wheels filled with irate models. And finally, Sonia and Matt find themselves outmatched by a well-armed street gang and its charismatic leader.

programme.title: Win Some, Quarrelsome, Lose Some
programme.desc: First, Lou and Sonia have an order for a Jaguar behind a retail outlet center, but will the loaders let their precious car be loaded up without a fight? Then, Matt and Froy find themselves amidst a lover's quarrel when a disgruntled wife reveals that she stopped payment on her car because of her cheating husband. And finally, a debtor is nowhere to be found when Lou, Lyndah, and Rob head out to a seemingly quiet neighborhood. The silence is broken when the debtor finally shows up in another vehicle with bang!

programme.title: Missed Dates
programme.desc: First, Lyndah is put in a tough situation - she has to control a sobbing, cop-calling debtor and turn away Frankie's unwanted and inappropriate advances - all at the same time. Then, Matt and Froy have two problems on their hands, when they decide to haul away both a stripped-down husk of a car and the phone number of its owner's coquettish and bathrobe-wearing ex-girlfriend. Finally, Lou, Froy, and Lyndah head way out into the country to wrangle with a case of mistaken identity and a trio of shotgun-wielding cultists.

programme.title: Adult Film Star
programme.desc: First, Lou, Froy, and Matt press charges after a violent debtor attacks the crew. Later, Lou, Sonia, and Froy head out to the boondocks to repo a BMW in the middle of an adult film shoot. And finally, Sonia and Lyndah ride out in Sonia's car to meet up with the debtor's sister-in-law who helps the team find the debtor's car.

programme.title: Smoke, Lead, and Alcohol
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy venture into one of the city's most dangerous neighborhoods, only to find a debtor ready to defend his ride by pumping it full of lead, with no concern for who gets caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: Pizza, Hook-ups, and a Suspicious Suitcase
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy interrupt a young couple's romantic entanglement when they try to hook up to the car a young couple are trying to hook-up in. Next, tempers and Pizza fly when Sonia, Matt, and Lyndah repo a pizza parlor's customer's car. And finally, Sonia and Lou grab a truck from a car graveyard, but soon have to avoid the employee's scratch attacks and deal with the nervous debtor with a suspicious suitcase full of cash.

programme.title: Repo Arigato, Mr. Roboto
programme.desc: Sonia and Carlos put their best performance in when they attempt to repossess a vehicle from a pair of silver-painted robot men.? Matt and Froy need a second opinion when they run into a debtor with a questionable claim about a life-threatening illness.?

programme.title: Super-Sonia
programme.desc: Things get a lot more complicated for the team when Sonia snaps and puts herself on the business end of a knife and the gangbanger wielding it. Froy and Sonia wind up in the middle of a relationship dispute with an absent-minded professor who's got too many cars and too many girlfriends, Matt and Froy confront a debtor with a tiny motorcycle and an enormous mean streak, and Sonia and Lyndah find themselves in the middle of a gang dispute gone horribly awry.

programme.title: Monk in the Trunk
programme.desc: Sonia's recovery takes another unexpected turn when she goes too far with a debtor. Sonia and Matt sneak onto a big studio lot to repossess a trailer, but there's a big surprise in store when it turns out Matt and the movie's star have a checkered history, Lou and Sonia interrupt a knitting circle to take a car from a booze-soaked craft enthusiast, and Matt and Froy head out to wine country for a disastrous run-in with a group of debtors who have sworn an oath of silence.

programme.title: Coffee-slinging Waitress
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy storm a studio to repossess a Corvette from a surly European photographer and his hapless, bikini-clad subjects. Then, Lou and Matt stumble into a lover's quarrel - will they be able to reclaim the vehicle from two suited suitors? And finally, Lyndah and Sonia wind up getting burned on a repo, literally, when a coffee-wielding waitress goes buck-wild.

Although it's a static video, there are a lot of dynamic elements such as gentle clouds passing, and the occasional sunlit rainbow to keep the viewer engaged.

programme.title: Wildlife Wonders of South America
programme.desc: "Wildlife Wonders of South America" begins at sunrise in the Salar De Uyuni, where viewers will enjoy a vibrant array of flamingo and llama scenes from the unique high altitude volcanic salt lakes. From there, we move south down to the Chilean landscapes of San Pedro Atacama to enjoy a miracle of new life and welcoming of an adorable Vicuńa baby. Last but most certainly not least, you'll be gracefully transported to the infamous Torres Del Paine National Park in Patagonia.
